records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Disseized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Disseizing.]

defs: To deprive of seizin or possession; to dispossess or oust wrongfully (one in freehold possession of land); -- followed by of; as, to disseize a tenant of his freehold.
quotes: Which savage beasts strive as eagerly to keep and hold those golden mines, as the Arimaspians to disseize them thereof.
